meaning: n.穆穆袍(一种色彩鲜艳的女式宽大长袍,最初为夏威夷女子所穿,现流行于美国全国)
examples: Did you expect Brando Nadal, plopping into a chair in a silk muumuu at this hotel restaurant on Central Park South?
Distinct and monstrous in a bright muumuu, her dark hair done up in a row of little curls along her forehead, cheeks sloping into her neck.
It is not uncommon to encounter a girl in a muumuu singing into a carrot, a Rastafarian grooving on the sidewalk or a pigtailed granny cruising around on a low-rider bike.
